info.title: hKask API
info.description:
A Minimal Viable Container for Agents — HTTP API.

hKask is an agent runtime grounded in 12 architectural principles
(P0–P12) expressed through four composable patterns: Skills Model,
CNS Feedback Loop, Agentic AI Mediation, and Agent Creation with
Sovereign Memory. This API exposes all capabilities equally across
CLI, API, and MCP surfaces under P3 (Equal Surface Exposure).

All endpoints carry OCAP DelegationToken authentication (P4).
Data access is governed by user sovereignty and affirmative
consent (P1, P2).

get.description: List all capabilities currently held by a specific bot. Requires the bot's WebID as a path parameter. Returns a JSON array of capability string identifiers. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Grant capability to bot
post.description: Grant a new capability to a specific bot. Requires the bot's WebID as a path parameter and a GrantCapabilityRequest body specifying the capability to grant. Returns a 200 confirmation on success, 400 for invalid requests. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Chat with the Curator or a specified agent.
post.description:
Accepts an optional `model` field to switch the LLM at request time.
When omitted, the server default (`qwen3:8b`) is used. The response
echoes the `model` used, confirming which LLM generated the output.

Use `GET /api/models` or `GET /api/models/search?q=...` to discover
available model identifiers.

post.summary: Stream chat inference output as Server-Sent Events.
post.description:
Accepts the same `ChatRequest` as `/api/chat` but streams the inference
output as SSE `data:` events. Each event carries a JSON object with
`text_delta`, `model`, and optionally `finish_reason`. The final event
has `finish_reason: "stop"` and includes `usage` stats.

This is a surface-layer endpoint — it bypasses ChatService's full
pipeline (memory recall, episodic storage) and calls the inference port
directly for streaming. Use `/api/chat` for the full pipeline with
memory integration.

get.description: Get CNS health status for the entire system. Returns CnsHealthResponse including overall health boolean, critical alert count, warning count, and total variety deficit. Use this endpoint to monitor system homeostasis. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: Subscribe to CNS events as an SSE stream.
get.description:
The endpoint upgrades the HTTP response to a long-lived SSE connection.
Events matching the requested span namespaces are forwarded in real time.
Lag notifications are emitted when the client falls behind.

Get CNS variety counter values across all monitored domains. Returns CnsVarietyResponse with per-domain counters, domain list, and total deficit. Variety counters track information diversity per Ashby's Law of Requisite Variety. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Consolidate episodic memories for an agent.
post.description:
Triggers the semantic consolidation loop: reads raw episodic triples,
derives confidence-weighted semantic knowledge, and deletes low-confidence
ephemera. Requires the agent's master passphrase for authorization.

get.summary: Query episodic memories for the authenticated caller by entity.
get.description:
Routes through `EpisodicStoragePort` with OCAP discipline.
Applies confidence decay, temporal attention weighting, and deduplication
(subloops 2a.2–2a.4) before returning results.

post.summary: Store an episodic triple for the authenticated caller.
post.description:
Routes through `EpisodicStoragePort` with OCAP discipline:
the `DelegationToken` from HTTP auth is verified at the membrane.

get.summary: Get episodic storage usage for the authenticated caller.
get.description: Get episodic memory usage statistics for the authenticated caller. Returns EpisodicUsageResponse with current memory count and storage budget. Use this to monitor memory consumption before hitting storage limits. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: List all goals for the authenticated agent, optionally filtered by state.
get.description: List all MDS goals for the authenticated agent, optionally filtered by lifecycle state. Accepts an optional `state` query parameter to filter by goal state. Returns GoalListResponse with an array of goals (id, text, state, visibility). Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP); 403 if authority denied.

post.summary: Create a new goal for the authenticated agent.
post.description: Capture a new MDS goal for the authenticated agent. Requires a CreateGoalRequest body with goal text and visibility. Returns GoalResponse with the created goal's id, state, text, and visibility. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP); 403 if authority denied.

post.summary: Transition a goal to a new state (legal transitions only).
post.description: Transition a goal to a new lifecycle state. Only legal state transitions are accepted. Requires the goal ID as a path parameter and a SetGoalStateRequest body with the target state. Returns 200 on success, 400 for illegal transitions, 404 if goal not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Invoke an MCP tool directly.
post.description:
Requires authentication via Bearer token. Dispatches the tool call
through the MCP runtime with capability verification. The server
that owns the tool is resolved automatically from the tool name.

get.description: List all registered MCP servers currently connected to the hKask runtime. Returns a JSON array of server name strings. Use this to discover available tool providers before invoking tools. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

Returns all tools discovered from running MCP servers. If no servers
are started, the list will be empty.

get.summary: List all available models from all configured providers.
get.description:
Queries DeepInfra, fal.ai, and Together AI and returns metadata for each
available model with provider prefix applied. Returns an empty list if
no providers are reachable (graceful degradation).

get.summary: Search available models by name (fuzzy matching).
get.description:
Performs case-insensitive substring matching against model names
across all providers. Use this endpoint to discover valid model
identifiers before passing them to `POST /api/chat` via the `model` field.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Fuzzy search query — matches model name (case-insensitive substring)

get.summary: Check whether the authenticated agent has access to a specific data category.
get.description: Check whether the authenticated agent has access to a specific data category through the P4 (OCAP) membrane. Requires a `category` query parameter specifying the data category to check. Returns AccessCheckResponse with classification (PUBLIC/SHARED/SOVEREIGN) and the access gate required. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Grant explicit consent for a data category, enabling data sharing.
post.description: Grant explicit sovereign consent for a data category, enabling data sharing under P2 (Affirmative Consent). Requires a SovereigntyConsentRequest body specifying the category. Returns SovereigntyConsentResponse with updated consent state and granted categories list. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Revoke all explicit consent — only public data remains accessible.
post.description: Revoke all explicit sovereign consent — only public data remains accessible. This is a global revoke (P2 Affirmative Consent withdrawal). Returns SovereigntyConsentResponse confirming revocation. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary:
Get sovereignty status for the authenticated agent — consent state,
data category classifications, and granted sharing categories.
get.description: Get sovereignty status for the authenticated agent: consent state, data category classifications (public, shared, sovereign), and explicitly granted sharing categories. Returns SovereigntyStatusResponse. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: List specifications — with optional category filter
get.description: List all specifications in the system. Returns a JSON array of SpecListResponse objects with spec_id, name, category, and completeness flag. Use this to discover available specifications before querying details. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Capture a new specification (MDS §3: spec/goal/capture)
post.description: Capture a new specification (MDS §3: spec/goal/capture). Requires a SpecCaptureRequestDto body with description and optional context. Returns the captured specification on success. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.description: Get specification collection coherence score (MDS §3: spec/graph/coherence). Analyzes cross-spec consistency — detects contradictions, violations, and provides improvement suggestions. Returns SpecCoherenceResponse with coherence_score, violations, and suggestions. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: Get a single specification by ID
get.description: Get a single specification by its unique ID. Requires the spec_id as a path parameter. Returns SpecDetailResponse with the specification's name, category, domain anchor, and full requirements list. Returns 404 if the spec is not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: Get writing quality assessment for a spec (MDS §3: spec/require/writing-quality)
get.description: Get writing quality assessment for a specification (MDS §3: spec/require/writing-quality). Requires the spec_id as a path parameter. Returns SpecWritingQualityResponse with dimensions_passing count and meets_publication_standard flag. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

List all registered templates across the system. Returns a JSON array of TemplateResponse objects with template id, name, description, type, source path, and lexicon terms. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

Get a single template by its unique ID. Requires the template ID as a path parameter. Returns TemplateResponse with full template metadata including name, description, template_type, source_path, and lexicon_terms. Returns 404 if the template is not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).
List all registered ACP agents with their WebID, agent type, capabilities, active status, and registration timestamp. Returns AgentListResponse. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

delete.description: Unregister and remove an ACP agent by its agent ID. Requires the agent_id as a path parameter. Returns 200 on success, 404 if agent not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.description: Get current backup configuration including auto-snapshot setting, retention policy, tracked artifact types, and verify-after-snapshot flag. Returns BackupConfigResponse. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

put.description: Update backup configuration. Requires an UpdateConfigRequest body with optional fields for auto_snapshot, retention, tracked_types, and verify_after_snapshot. Returns the updated BackupConfigResponse. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.description: List backup snapshots with optional type and limit filters. Accepts optional `type` (filter by artifact type) and `limit` (max snapshots to return) query parameters. Returns ListResponse with an array of snapshot metadata. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Prune expired backup snapshots.
post.description: Prune expired backup snapshots according to the configured retention policy. Requires a PruneRequest body with an optional `dry_run` flag to preview removals without deleting. Returns PruneResponse with counts of evaluated, retained, and removed snapshots. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Restore artifacts from a backup snapshot.
post.description: Restore artifacts from a specific backup snapshot. Requires a RestoreRequest body with commit_hash and scope (all artifacts, by type and IDs, or by specific type). Returns RestoreResponse with the list of restored artifact IDs. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Create a backup snapshot.
post.description: Create a new backup snapshot of tracked artifacts. Requires a SnapshotRequest body specifying the scope (all tracked types or specific artifact types/IDs). Returns SnapshotResponse with artifact_count, commit hashes, timestamp, and trigger info. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Verify backup integrity.
post.description: Verify integrity of all backup snapshots by checking git object hashes. No request body required. Returns VerifyResponse with per-repository verification reports including ok flag, verified_blobs, total_blobs, and corrupt_hashes. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.description: List all skill bundles. Returns BundleListResponse with bundle summaries including id, name, description, version, skill_count, and visibility. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Compose a new bundle from specified skills
post.description: Compose a new skill bundle from specified skills. Requires a ComposeBundleRequest body with name, skills list, and visibility. Returns ComposeBundleResponse with the composed manifest, message, and warnings. Returns 400 for invalid skill references. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.description: Get a specific skill bundle by its ID. Requires the bundle ID as a path parameter. Returns the full bundle manifest as JSON. Returns 404 if the bundle is not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Apply a bundle to the current session
post.description: Apply a skill bundle to the current session, activating all its skills. Requires the bundle ID as a path parameter. Returns ApplyBundleResponse with bundle_id, name, skill_count, and status. Returns 404 if the bundle is not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

delete.description: Deactivate an active skill bundle, unloading all its skills from the session. Requires the bundle ID as a path parameter. Returns DeactivateBundleResponse confirming the new status. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Evolve a bundle (re-compose when skills have changed)
post.description: Evolve a bundle by re-composing it when its constituent skills have changed. Requires the bundle ID as a path parameter. Returns EvolveBundleResponse with the evolved manifest, changes list, and message. Returns 404 if the bundle is not found. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.description: List all pending curator escalations requiring human attention. Returns ListEscalationsResponse with escalation entries including id, bot_id, status, created_at, error_context, and retry_count. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Dismiss an escalation as non-actionable, recording who dismissed it.
post.description: Dismiss a curator escalation as non-actionable. Requires the escalation ID as a path parameter and a DismissEscalationRequest body recording who dismissed it. Returns DismissEscalationResponse with id and updated status. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Resolve an escalation by marking it handled with the resolver's identity.
post.description: Resolve a curator escalation, marking it as handled. Requires the escalation ID as a path parameter and a ResolveEscalationRequest body recording who resolved it. Returns ResolveEscalationResponse with id and updated status. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: Get Curator metacognition status — escalation statistics and bot health reports.
get.description: Get Curator metacognition status including escalation statistics and per-bot health reports. Returns MetacognitionStatusResponse with bot_reports and escalation_stats. Use this to monitor bot health and system self-awareness. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Archive a repository template crate
post.description:
Uses `GitCasAdapter::load_template_crate` for template loading (domain
operation) and `GitCASPort::resolve_ref` for SHA resolution.

get.summary: Resolve a git reference to a SHA using GitCASPort

parameters.name: sha
parameters.description: Git reference to resolve (branch, tag, or commit prefix)

get.description: Resolve a git reference (branch, tag, or commit prefix) to a full commit SHA. Uses GitCASPort for resolution. Requires the reference as a path parameter. Returns ResolveShaResponse with the resolved SHA. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

Get the current wallet balance. Returns WalletBalanceResponse with rJoules balance, USDC equivalent, gas equivalent, and wallet ID. Returns 503 if the wallet service is not configured. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: Get a deposit address for receiving USDC.

parameters.name: wallet_id
parameters.description: Wallet ID (UUID). Defaults to system wallet if omitted.

get.description: Get a deposit address for receiving USDC. Accepts optional query parameters: `chain` (blockchain), `private` (privacy mode), and `wallet_id` (defaults to system wallet). Returns DepositAddressResponse with address, chain, and privacy mode. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Generate a one-time deposit reference for shielded deposits.
post.description: Generate a one-time deposit reference for shielded deposits. Requires a DepositReferenceRequest body with chain and optional wallet_id. Returns DepositReferenceResponse with reference string, chain, and expiry. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

get.summary: Estimate current network withdrawal fee using configured price feed.
get.description: Estimate current network withdrawal fee using the configured price feed. Accepts an optional `chain` query parameter to specify the blockchain. Returns WithdrawalFeeEstimateResponse with fee in rJoules, native units, and USDC equivalent. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

List all active API keys with their status, spending limits, and expiry. Returns ApiKeyListResponse with key entries including key_id, limit_rj, spent_rj, status, and expires_at. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Create a new API key.
post.description: Create a new API key with spending limits and expiry. Requires a CreateKeyRequest body specifying chain, limit_rj, expiry_days, private mode, and wallet_id. Returns ApiKeyCreatedResponse with the key_id, private_key_hex, spending_limit_rj, and expires_at. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

delete.description: Revoke an API key, immediately disabling it. Requires the key_id as a path parameter. Returns ApiKeyRevokedResponse confirming revocation. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

parameters.name: wallet_id
parameters.description: Wallet ID (UUID). Defaults to system wallet if omitted.

get.description: Get paginated transaction history for a wallet. Accepts optional query parameters: `limit`, `offset`, and `wallet_id`. Returns TransactionListResponse with an array of transactions including rjoules_delta, balance_after, and timestamp. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

post.summary: Withdraw rJoules as USDC to an external address.
post.description: Initiate a withdrawal of rJoules as USDC to an external address. Requires a WithdrawRequest body with amount_rj, chain, to_address, private mode, and wallet_id. Returns WithdrawalResponse with amount_rj, chain, privacy mode, and tx_hash. Requires DelegationToken auth (P4 OCAP).

AccessCheckResponse.description:
Access check response — P4 (OCAP) membrane result.

Reports whether the authenticated agent has access to a specific data
category. `classification` is one of: PUBLIC, SHARED, SOVEREIGN.
`access_required` is the OCAP-level gate (e.g., "capability:memory",
"consent:required").

AcpAgentResponse.description:
ACP agent response — registered agent in the ACP capability delegation system (P4 OCAP).

`agent_type` is "Bot" or "Replicant" (P10).
`capabilities` are the granted capability verbs this agent holds.
`active` indicates whether the agent is currently allowed to exercise its capabilities.

AgentListResponse.description: Agent list response — all ACP-registered agents.

oneOf.description: Snapshot all artifacts of a single type.

ApiBackupScope.description:
Backup scope for API requests.

Controls which artifacts a snapshot or restore targets:
- `Full` — all tracked artifact types (templates, styles, triples).
- `ByType` — all artifacts of a single type (e.g., "template").
- `ByIds` — specific artifacts by ID within a type.

ApiKeyCreatedResponse.description:
API key created response.

**Security:** `private_key_hex` is shown only once. Store it securely.

private_key_hex.description: Private key in hex (shown only once — store securely)

ApiKeyEntry.description:
API key entry — status of an existing API key.

`status` is "active", "revoked", "exhausted", or "expired".

spent_rj.description: Cumulative rJoules spent via this key

keys.description: All API keys for the authenticated wallet

ApiRestoreScope.description: Backup restore scope for API requests.

ApplyBundleResponse.description:
Apply bundle response — result of activating a bundle in the current session.

`status` is "active" on success.

BackupConfigResponse.description:
Backup config response — current snapshot and retention configuration.

`tracked_types` lists artifact types included in snapshots.
`retention` is the time-based cleanup policy (None = keep indefinitely).

BotStatusReportResponse.description: Bot status report — reflects the health of a specific bot agent.

last_report.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last report (None if never reported)

BundleSummary.description:
Bundle summary for list responses — a skill bundle in the Skills Model (Pattern A).

`visibility` is "private" or "shared" (P11).
`skill_count` is the number of WordAct/FlowDef/KnowAct templates in the bundle.

ChatRequest.description:
Chat request sent to the Curator or a specified agent.

The `model` field allows switching the LLM at request time. When omitted,
the server default (qwen3:8b) is used. Use `GET /api/models` to discover
available models, and `GET /api/models/search?q=...` for fuzzy matching.

model.description: Model override for inference (e.g., "qwen3:8b"). If unset, uses the server default.

template_id.description: Optional template ID to contextualize the prompt

ChatResponse.description:
Chat response from the Curator or agent.

The `model` field echoes which LLM was used, confirming model switching.

CnsHealthResponse.description:
CNS health response — P9 (Homeostatic Self-Regulation).

`healthy: false` means one or more variety domains are in deficit (below
their configured threshold). Check `critical_count` and `warning_count` for
severity. `overall_deficit` is the sum of all per-domain deficits.

critical_count.description: Count of domains in critical deficit (escalation-triggered)

healthy.description: Whether all variety domains are within healthy thresholds

overall_deficit.description: Sum of all per-domain variety deficits

warning_count.description: Count of domains in warning deficit

CnsSubscribeParams.description: Query parameters for CNS SSE subscription

CnsVarietyResponse.description:
CNS variety response — per-domain variety counters for the Cybernetic Nervous System (Pattern B).

`domains` lists all canonical CNS span namespaces registered (e.g., cns.tool,
cns.inference, cns.memory). `total_deficit` is the aggregate variety gap across
all domains.

counters.description: Per-domain variety counters keyed by namespace

domains.description: All registered CNS span namespace domains

total_deficit.description: Aggregate variety deficit across all domains

CommitInfo.description: Git commit info — repository and commit hash for a backup snapshot.

ComposeBundleRequest.description:
Compose bundle request — create a new skill bundle from individual template IDs (Pattern A).

Requires at least 2 skills. The bundle composer uses inference to generate
a manifest describing how the skills compose together.

ComposeBundleResponse.description:
Compose bundle response — result of inference-driven bundle composition.

`manifest` is the composed bundle definition (JSON).
`warnings` lists any composition concerns detected.

ConsolidateRequest.description:
Consolidate request — triggers episodic-to-semantic memory consolidation.

Requires the agents master passphrase for authorization (P4 OCAP).
The passphrase is derived via HKDF-SHA256 to produce the capability_key
used as the DB passphrase.

agent_webid.description: Agent WebID whose episodic memory to consolidate

confidence_floor.description:
Confidence floor — semantic triples at or below this are deleted.
Overrides the SemanticLoop default (0.33).

max_semantic_triples.description:
Maximum semantic triples to retain after consolidation.
If exceeded, lowest-confidence triples are deleted.

passphrase.description:
Master passphrase for authorization (derived via HKDF-SHA256 to produce
the capability_key used as the DB passphrase, matching onboarding flow)

ConsolidateResponse.description: Consolidate response — outcome counts from the semantic consolidation loop.

CreateGoalRequest.description:
Create goal request — P4 OCAP-gated goal creation.

Visibility defaults to "private" when omitted. See P11 (Digital Public/Private
Sphere) for the visibility taxonomy.

CreateKeyRequest.description:
Create API key request.

API keys carry a spending limit in rJoules and an optional expiry.
`private` controls shielded (default: true) vs transparent mode.

expiry_days.description: Key expiry in days from creation (None = no expiry)

private.description: Privacy: true = shielded, false = transparent (default: true)

wallet_id.description: Wallet ID (UUID). Defaults to system wallet if omitted.

CreatePodRequest.description:
Create pod request — Pattern D agent creation.

`template` is a FlowDef template ID. `persona_yaml` is the agent persona
definition in YAML format (maps to a WordAct).

template.description: FlowDef template ID defining the agent's operational pattern

CreatePodResponse.description: Create pod response — returns the new pod's ID.

DeactivateBundleResponse.description:
Deactivate bundle response.

`status` is "deactivated" on success.

DepositAddressResponse.description:
Deposit address response — a generated deposit address for a specific chain.

`privacy` is "shielded" (private, zk-protected) or "transparent" (public).

DepositReferenceRequest.description: Deposit reference request — create a time-limited deposit reference for tracking.

wallet_id.description: Wallet ID (UUID). Defaults to system wallet if omitted.

DepositReferenceResponse.description: Deposit reference response — a time-limited reference code for an incoming deposit.

dismissed_by.description: WebID of the human or agent dismissing the escalation

EpisodeResponse.description:
A single episodic triple as returned over the API.

Each episode is a (entity, attribute, value) triple with confidence,
visibility governance (P11), and a temporal validity marker (`valid_from`).
`visibility` is one of: "private", "shared", "public".
`perspective` is the WebID of the observing agent (P12).

valid_from.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this triple became valid

count.description: Current triple count for the caller's perspective.

EscalationEntryResponse.description:
Escalation entry — a pending Curator escalation triggered by bot output below
confidence threshold or context errors (Pattern C, P12).

Status: "pending", "resolved", or "dismissed".

bot_id.description: Bot WebID that triggered the escalation

confidence.description: Confidence score (0.0–1.0) at time of escalation

error_context.description: Error context or reason for escalation

resolved_by.description: WebID of the resolver (P12 — accountable identity)

retry_count.description: Number of retry attempts before escalation

template_id.description: Template that produced the flagged output

EscalationStatsResponse.description: Escalation statistics — aggregate counts across all escalations.

EvolveBundleResponse.description:
Evolve bundle response — result of re-composing a bundle after skill changes.

`evolved_manifest` is the updated bundle definition.
`changes` lists what changed from the previous version.

GoalResponse.description: Goal response — reflects current goal state and visibility (P4, P11).

GrantCapabilityRequest.description:
Capability grant request — P4 OCAP capability assignment to a bot agent.

Capabilities follow the `verb:resource` pattern (e.g., "tool:execute",
"template:render").

McpInvokeRequest.description:
MCP invoke request — invoke a tool on a running MCP server.

`tool` is the fully-qualified tool name. Use GET /api/mcp/tools to
discover available tools before invoking. `input` is a JSON object of
tool arguments (defaults to {}).

McpInvokeResponse.description:
MCP invoke response — result of a tool invocation.

The `result` shape varies by tool. `server` identifies which MCP server
handled the invocation.

server.description: MCP server that provided the tool

MetacognitionStatusResponse.description:
Curator metacognition status — aggregate view of system health (Pattern C).

Combines escalation queue statistics with per-bot health reports.
This is the primary observability endpoint for the Curator mediation loop.

ModelEntry.description:
A model available through the inference router.

Includes metadata from the provider's model listing endpoint:
model family, parameter count, quantization level, and disk size.

ModelListResponse.description:
Response containing available models.

Returned by `GET /api/models` and `GET /api/models/search`.
Model names from this response can be used as the `model` field
in `POST /api/chat` requests.

count.description: Total number of models in the list

ModelSearchQuery.description:
Query parameters for fuzzy model search.

The `q` parameter performs case-insensitive substring matching
against model names. For example, `q=llama` matches "llama3.1:8b",
"llama3.1:70b", etc.

q.description: Fuzzy search query — matches model name (case-insensitive substring)

PodStatusResponse.description:
Pod status response — current state of an agent pod (Pattern D).

`state` is one of: "active", "inactive", "error".
`agent_type` is one of: "Bot", "Replicant" (P10).

created_at.description: Unix epoch seconds of pod creation

PruneRequest.description:
Backup prune request.

`dry_run` (default: true) reports what would be removed without deleting.
Set to false to actually remove expired snapshots.

PruneResponse.description:
Backup prune response.

`evaluated` is snapshots checked. `removed` lists deleted commit hashes.
`retained` is snapshots kept.

RepoVerifyReport.description: Repository verify report — per-repo Git integrity verification result.

resolved_by.description: WebID of the human or agent resolving the escalation

RestoreResponse.description:
Backup restore response.

`artifacts` lists the artifacts recovered from the backup snapshot.

RestoredArtifact.description: Restored artifact — identifies a single artifact recovered from a backup.

RetentionConfigResponse.description:
Retention config — time-based snapshot cleanup policy.

`daily_days` is how many daily snapshots to keep.
`weekly_weeks` is how many weekly snapshots to keep.

SetGoalStateRequest.description:
Set goal state request — state machine transition.

Legal states: "active", "completed", "abandoned".
Legal transitions: active→completed, active→abandoned.

SnapshotResponse.description:
Backup snapshot response — result of a snapshot operation via GitCAS.

`commits` lists the Git commits backing this snapshot.
`trigger` is "manual" (API-triggered) or "auto" (scheduled).

SovereigntyConsentRequest.description:
Sovereignty consent request — P2 (Affirmative Consent).

Grant explicit consent for a data category. Valid categories:
"memory", "inference", "replica", "all".

category.description: Data category to grant consent for (e.g. "memory", "inference", "all")

SovereigntyConsentResponse.description:
Sovereignty consent response — P2 (Affirmative Consent).

`consent: true` means the grant was accepted and data sharing is enabled
for the listed categories. `consent: false` means consent was revoked and
only public data remains accessible.

SovereigntyStatusResponse.description:
Sovereignty status response — P1 (User Sovereignty) and P2 (Affirmative Consent).

Reflects the authenticated agent's current data sovereignty boundary:
which categories are sovereign (agent-only), shared (consent-gated), and
public (always accessible). `granted_categories` lists categories where
explicit consent has been given.

explicit_consent.description: Whether any explicit consent has been granted

granted_categories.description: Categories for which explicit consent has been granted

public_data.description: Data categories that are always publicly accessible

requires_affirmative_consent.description: "required" if the boundary demands affirmative consent; "open" otherwise

shared_data.description: Data categories eligible for sharing after explicit consent

sovereign_data.description: Data categories that are agent-sovereign (never shared without consent)

SpecCaptureRequestDto.description: Spec capture request — MDS-aligned: uses description + context (not category/domain/criteria).

SpecDetailResponse.description:
Spec detail response — full details for a single MDS specification.

`domain_anchor` identifies the bounded context (always "hkask" for this system).
`requirements` lists the spec's captured requirements as plain-text statements.

category.description: MDS category: domain, composition, trust, lifecycle, or curation

SpecListResponse.description:
Spec list response — summary of a single MDS specification.

`category` is one of the five MDS categories: domain, composition, trust,
lifecycle, curation. `complete` indicates whether the spec satisfies its
category completeness predicate (MDS §2).

category.description: MDS category: domain, composition, trust, lifecycle, or curation

complete.description: Whether the spec satisfies its category completeness predicate

SpecWritingQualityResponse.description: Spec writing quality response — MDS §3: spec/require/writing-quality

StoreEpisodeRequest.description: Request to store an episodic triple.

StoreEpisodeResponse.description: Response from storing an episodic triple.

TemplateResponse.description:
Template response — a registered skill template in the WordAct / FlowDef / KnowAct taxonomy (Pattern A).

`template_type` is one of: WordAct, FlowDef, KnowAct.
`lexicon_terms` maps the template to canonical vocabulary terms.

lexicon_terms.description: Canonical vocabulary terms this template implements

source_path.description: Source file path within the registry

template_type.description: Template type: WordAct, FlowDef, or KnowAct

TransactionResponse.description:
Transaction response — a single wallet transaction.

`rjoules_delta` is positive for deposits, negative for withdrawals.

rjoules_delta.description: Change in rJoules (positive = deposit, negative = withdrawal)

UpdateConfigRequest.description:
Backup config update request.

All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.
`retention` accepts "daily:N,weekly:M" format (e.g., "daily:7,weekly:4").

VarietyCounterResponse.description:
CNS variety counter for a single domain.

`variety` is the tracked behavioral diversity for this domain.
`entropy` is the Shannon entropy of the domain's observation distribution
(0.0 when not yet computed).

VerifyResponse.description:
Backup verify response.

Returns per-repository integrity verification reports from GitCAS.

WalletBalanceResponse.description:
Wallet balance response — current rJoule balance and fiat equivalents.

`rjoules` is the canonical energy unit for inference and memory operations.
`usdc_equivalent` and `gas_equivalent` are approximate fiat conversions
based on the current calibrated gas-per-rjoule rate (P9 homeostatic calibration).

rjoules.description: Balance in rJoules — the canonical energy unit for inference operations

usdc_equivalent.description: Approximate USD Coin equivalent at current calibration rate

WithdrawRequest.description:
Withdraw request — withdraw rJoules to an on-chain address.

`chain` selects the target blockchain (default: "hinkal").
`private` controls shielded vs transparent mode (default: true).

private.description: Privacy: true = shielded, false = transparent (default: true)

wallet_id.description: Wallet ID (UUID). Defaults to system wallet if omitted.

WithdrawalFeeEstimateResponse.description:
Withdrawal fee estimate — cost of withdrawing rJoules to a target chain.

`rjoules` is the fee in the canonical energy unit.
`native_units` and `usdc_equivalent` are approximate conversions.

native_units.description: Fee in native chain units (e.g., SOL, HBAR)

WithdrawalResponse.description: Withdrawal response — confirmation of a completed on-chain withdrawal.

bearer_token.description:
DelegationToken — an OCAP capability token carrying the authenticated WebID and scoped permissions (P4).

Obtain via the REPL onboarding flow (`kask secret`) or agent registration (ACP).
